description: Adds a history of a contact value. Review the common c history commands. The history can be assigned a name for later reference with the optional name keyword. If not, the history will be given a default name based on its internally assigned id number.

keywords.name: contact-id
keywords.description: Set history location at the contact with ID i . This only applies to contact type histories \(area-sum\) , \(force-normal-sum\) and \(force-shear-sum\) .

keywords.name: dip
keywords.description: Only contacts or subcontacts with a dip equal to f will be considered when using the \(position\) keyword.

keywords.name: dip-direction
keywords.description: Only contacts or subcontacts with a dip-direction equal to f will be considered when using the \(position\) keyword.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Set history location at the position v . The history will be recorded for the contact or subcontact nearest to this location.

keywords.name: subcontact-id
keywords.description: Set history location at the subcontact with ID i .

keywords.name: area
keywords.description: Get the area of the subcontact.

keywords.name: area-sum
keywords.description: Get the sum of all subcontact areaa for a given contact.

keywords.name: displacement-normal
keywords.description: Get the normal contact displacement.

keywords.name: displacement-shear
keywords.description: Get the magnitude of shear displacement.

keywords.name: displacement-shear-x
keywords.description: Get the \(x\) -component of shear displacement in global coordinates.

keywords.name: displacement-shear-y
keywords.description: Get the \(y\) -component of shear displacement in global coordinates.

keywords.name: displacement-shear-z
keywords.description: Get the \(z\) -component of shear displacement in global coordinates.

keywords.name: displacement-shear-maximum
keywords.description: Get the maximum shear displacement observed at any time in the past.

keywords.name: force-normal
keywords.description: Get the normal subcontact force.

keywords.name: force-normal-sum
keywords.description: Get the sum of all subcontact normal forces for a given contact.

keywords.name: force-shear
keywords.description: Get the shear contact force.

keywords.name: force-shear-sum
keywords.description: Get the sum of all subcontact shear forces for a given contact.

keywords.name: stress-normal
keywords.description: Get the normal contact stress.

keywords.name: stress-shear
keywords.description: Get the shear contact stress.

keywords.name: stress-shear-x
keywords.description: Get the \(x\) -component of shear stress in global coordinates.

keywords.name: stress-shear-y
keywords.description: Get the \(y\) -component of shear stress in global coordinates.

keywords.name: stress-shear-z
keywords.description: Get the \(z\) -component of shear stress in global coordinates.

keywords.name: velocity-shear
keywords.description: Get the shear contact velocity magnitude.

keywords.name: velocity-shear-x
keywords.description: Get the \(x\) -component of shear velocity in global coordinates.

keywords.name: velocity-shear-y
keywords.description: Get the \(y\) -component of shear velocity in global coordinates.

keywords.name: velocity-shear-z
keywords.description: Get the \(z\) -component of shear velocity in global coordinates.
